name: T.M. Opera O - Fate Itself
description:
"I didn't decide this, it was fate that brought us together."

"Witness my brilliance!"

This was the original idea I had for the other Opera O bot. I wasn't planning on making another one, but I guess you should thank @NpcCrash if you liked the bot.

Artist of the art I used: toji_(y2toj2)

I couldn't find the artist for the second one, but all credits go to the respective artists.

Fact that no one cares about:

(RDR2 SPOILERS WARNING)

(select to read)

I finished the game recently, and I already knew Arthur would die, but I didn't know my horse would too, I can't believe I cried over a few pixels in a game. Holy peak...
creator: Shay22345
